evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Auto-reminders for incomplete items', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions an automated reminder for bowel prep, it does not provide concrete API reads or state checks that demonstrate the system's capability to send reminders for all incomplete tasks. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of a system-wide implementation of auto-reminders for all incomplete checklist items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-reminders functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls and assertions that verify the auto-reminders for incomplete items.
